title: Route Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade route cost analysis tool based on ISO 14040, Lean logistics, and Six Sigma principles. Calculates total cost per route including fuel, labor, maintenance, tolls, and hidden loss drivers.

inputs.label: Route Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total one-way distance of the route. Used as primary driver for fuel, labor, and maintenance costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total one-way distance of the route. Used as primary driver for fuel, labor, and maintenance costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rotanın tek yön toplam mesafesi. Yakıt, işçilik ve bakım maliyetleri için birincil sürücü olarak kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Einwegstrecke der Route. Wird als Haupttreiber für Kraftstoff-, Arbeits- und Wartungskosten verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale aller simple de la route. Utilisée comme principal facteur pour les coûts de carburant, main-d'œuvre et entretien.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia total de ida y vuelta de la ruta. Se utiliza como factor principal para costos de combustible, mano de obra y mantenimiento.

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption (L/100km)
inputs.businessContext: Average fuel consumption of the vehicle. Based on manufacturer data or telematics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fuel consumption of the vehicle. Based on manufacturer data or telematics.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aracın ortalama yakıt tüketimi. Üretici verileri veya telematik esas alınır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Kraftstoffverbrauch des Fahrzeugs. Basierend auf Herstellerdaten oder Telematik.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation moyenne de carburant du véhicule. Basée sur les données du constructeur ou la télématique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo promedio de combustible del vehículo. Basado en datos del fabricante o telemática.

inputs.label: Fuel Price (per liter)
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of diesel or gasoline. Updated weekly.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current market price of diesel or gasoline. Updated weekly.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dizel veya benzinin güncel piyasa fiyatı. Haftalık güncellenir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Marktpreis für Diesel oder Benzin. Wöchentlich aktualisiert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix actuel du diesel ou de l'essence sur le marché. Mis à jour chaque semaine.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio actual de mercado del diésel o gasolina. Actualizado semanalmente.

inputs.label: Driver Wage (€/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Gross hourly wage including social charges. Based on collective labor agreements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gross hourly wage including social charges. Based on collective labor agreements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sosyal giderler dahil brüt saatlik ücret. Toplu iş sözleşmelerine dayanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bruttostundenlohn inklusive Sozialabgaben. Basierend auf Tarifverträgen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire brut incluant les charges sociales. Basé sur les conventions collectives.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario bruto por hora incluyendo cargas sociales. Basado en convenios colectivos.

inputs.label: Average Speed (km/h)
inputs.businessContext: Expected average speed including traffic and stops. Used to calculate travel time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average speed including traffic and stops. Used to calculate travel time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Trafik ve duraklar dahil beklenen ortalama hız. Seyahat süresini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Durchschnittsgeschwindigkeit inklusive Verkehr und Stopps. Wird zur Berechnung der Reisezeit verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse moyenne attendue incluant le trafic et les arrêts. Utilisée pour calculer le temps de trajet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad media esperada incluyendo tráfico y paradas. Se utiliza para calcular el tiempo de viaje.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost (€/km)
inputs.businessContext: Average maintenance cost per kilometer including tires, oil, and repairs. Based on fleet data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average maintenance cost per kilometer including tires, oil, and repairs. Based on fleet data.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lastikler, yağ ve onarımlar dahil kilometre başına ortalama bakım maliyeti. Filo verilerine dayanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Wartungskosten pro Kilometer inklusive Reifen, Öl und Reparaturen. Basierend auf Flottendaten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût d'entretien moyen par kilomètre incluant pneus, huile et réparations. Basé sur les données de la flotte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio de mantenimiento por kilómetro incluyendo neumáticos, aceite y reparaciones. Basado en datos de flota.

inputs.label: Total Toll Cost (€)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all tolls on the route. Can be obtained from route planning software.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all tolls on the route. Can be obtained from route planning software.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rotadaki tüm geçiş ücretlerinin toplamı. Rota planlama yazılımından elde edilebilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe aller Mautgebühren auf der Route. Kann aus Routenplanungssoftware bezogen werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme de tous les péages sur la route. Peut être obtenue via un logiciel de planification d'itinéraire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de todos los peajes en la ruta. Se puede obtener del software de planificación de rutas.

inputs.label: Load Weight (tonnes)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of cargo. Affects fuel consumption and wear.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of cargo. Affects fuel consumption and wear.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kargonun toplam ağırlığı. Yakıt tüketimini ve aşınmayı etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtgewicht der Ladung. Beeinflusst Kraftstoffverbrauch und Verschleiß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids total de la cargaison. Affecte la consommation de carburant et l'usure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso total de la carga. Afecta el consumo de combustible y el desgaste.

rules.message: Distance must be greater than 0 km.
Load weight exceeds maximum legal limit (40 tonnes).
Round trip distance exceeds 5000 km limit.

thresholds.message: Fuel cost exceeds €200. Consider route optimization or fuel-efficient driving.
Labor cost exceeds €300. Evaluate driver scheduling or rest breaks.
Total route cost exceeds €1000. Perform detailed cost-benefit analysis.
Cost per km exceeds €2.0. Benchmark against industry average (€1.2–€1.8).
Fuel consumption is high relative to load. Check vehicle maintenance or driving behavior.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
